name: Lake Naivasha Rising Water Level Response Plan
notes: NEMA and county all claim jurisdiction
column15: 000 ha. No single authority has adopted a coordinated response. Flower farm lobby resists land-use restrictions.

name: Malewa River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Flower farm irrigation infrastructure within riparian zone
notes: Riparian buffer mapped. Horticulture irrigation abstraction and infrastructure inside buffer. Industry employs 100
column12: 000+ workers — political cost of enforcement is very high.

name: Hell's Gate Flash Flood Early Warning
blocking_factor: Warning reach to Kongoni settlement outside park boundary
notes: Flash flood warning system within Hell's Gate National Park operational. Kongoni settlement downstream not in alert chain. KWS jurisdiction ends at park boundary.

name: Lake Naivasha Catchment Integrated Management
notes: Catchment management plan adopted 2018. Implementation fragmented across 12 agencies. No single implementing authority. Annual reporting shows declining compliance.
